hero.title: AI for Consultant
hero.description: Your virtual assistant modernizes consulting by managing appointments, recording meeting notes, tracking project deadlines, sending follow-up reminders, and streamlining client communication.

stats.label: Fewer missed meetings and project deadlines with automated reminders.
Reduced hours spent on scheduling, note-taking, and administrative tasks.
Higher client satisfaction through consistent follow-ups and personalized care.

blocks.heading: Smart Support for Every Type of Consultant
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we understand that consultants juggle multiple clients, meetings, and deadlines daily. Our AI Virtual Receptionist is built to handle your admin tasks efficiently — answering calls, booking consultations, and managing client inquiries, so you can focus on strategy, delivery, and results. Whether you're a solo business consultant, marketing strategist, or part of a larger advisory firm, our AI adapts to your business perfectly.

blocks.heading: Stay Focused on Clients, Not Admin
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist handles incoming calls and messages professionally, ensuring clients always receive a prompt, polished response. It can answer questions like 'How can I book a consultation?', 'Do you offer business coaching?', or 'Can we arrange a strategy call this week?' — all while reflecting your brand's professional tone. It also manages bookings, reschedules, sends reminders, and ensures your schedule stays organized and up to date.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Client or Opportunity
blocks.description: Whether you're in a meeting, on a call, or traveling between clients, your AI Receptionist keeps your business running smoothly. It captures every inquiry, books discovery calls, and provides information about your consulting packages, services, or speaking engagements. You'll never miss a lead or follow-up opportunity again.

cards.title: Boosted Client Retention

whyChooseUs.title: Why Consultants Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by consultants across industries — from finance and business strategy to digital marketing and coaching. It integrates seamlessly with your booking systems, email, and CRM tools, ensuring a consistent and professional experience for every client. Most importantly, your AI Receptionist can be trained to match your business's exact workflow, tone, and service offerings — helping you maintain your brand's personal touch while scaling your operations. Let our AI manage your communication so you can focus on delivering results, growing your client base, and building long-term success.

card.heading: Simplify Client Notes and Follow-Ups
card.description: After each meeting, you can record a short voice memo that's automatically transcribed and summarized for easy reference. You can also upload proposals, project notes, or client feedback directly into your system, keeping your workflow efficient and your records organized.
